data.name: Suomi

weaponImprint.name: Unspoken Calling
weaponImprint.trait: Gains [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] at the start of the next action for 1 turn if the user moves 5 tiles or more.
weaponImprint.effect: Freeze damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. The value of applied [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600] is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. If the user's stability index is greater than 0 before using the Ultimate skill, the value of applied [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600] is increased by another 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increase damage dealt to Marley Thermal Power Plant by 2.5%; if the target has [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc], increase the damage dealt by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A cute, conscientious, and kind-hearted Doll who will do what it takes for a mission. She bravely steps forward for her companions in the Community whilst she wanders the lands in search of those she treasures dearly. You need not worry when entrusting her with assignments; she will never fail to meet your expectations of complete her missions.

skills.name: Pelting Snowflake
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Source of Warmth
skills.description:
At the end of the action, gains 2 points of Confectance Index, restores 5% of Suomi's max HP to other allied units within 6 tiles. If the target's HP is below 50%, increase the amount restored to 10%.

When allied units (excluding Suomi) use basic attacks or skills, Suomi applies [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012] to a random enemy target within 6 tiles of herself.

When an enemy unit within range takes targeted damage from an ally, prioritizes using [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] once, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. Applies [effect:a19417f1-0ecf-466a-a904-29e3de492bcf] to the allied units for 2 turns. This can be triggered twice per turn. When HP is above 80%, gains [effect:979e032e-adde-4d68-a1b8-77386c86901e].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the end of the action, gains 2 points of Confectance Index, restores 5% of Suomi's max HP to other allied units within 6 tiles. If the target's HP is below 50%, increase the amount restored to 10%.

If allied units have [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279], applies [effect:089480d9-864e-47ff-a750-08dd03ab7ba4] to them.

When allied units (excluding Suomi) use basic attacks or skills, Suomi applies 1 stack of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012] to a random enemy target within 6 tiles of herself.

When an enemy unit within range takes targeted damage from an ally, prioritizes using [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] once, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. Applies [effect:a19417f1-0ecf-466a-a904-29e3de492bcf] to the allied units for 2 turns. This can be triggered twice per turn. When HP is above 80%, gains [effect:979e032e-adde-4d68-a1b8-77386c86901e].
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the end of the action, gains 2 points of Confectance Index, restores 5% of Suomi's max HP to other allied units within 6 tiles. If the target's HP is below 50%, increase the amount restored to 10%.

If allied units have [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279], applies [effect:089480d9-864e-47ff-a750-08dd03ab7ba4] to them.

When allied units (excluding Suomi) use basic attacks or skills, Suomi applies 1 stack of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012] to a random enemy target within 6 tiles of herself.

When an enemy unit within range takes targeted damage from an ally, prioritizes using [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] once, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. Applies [effect:a19417f1-0ecf-466a-a904-29e3de492bcf] to the allied units for 2 turns. Restores 1 point of stability index of allied units within 4 tiles of Suomi. This can be triggered thrice per turn. When HP is above 80%, gains [effect:979e032e-adde-4d68-a1b8-77386c86901e].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
If allied units have [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279], apply [effect:089480d9-864e-47ff-a750-08dd03ab7ba4] to them.

The effect of [effect:979e032e-adde-4d68-a1b8-77386c86901e] is enhanced, support range is increased by 2 tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Addtional effect [effect:089480d9-864e-47ff-a750-08dd03ab7ba4] is added: when attacked, if [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] is not broken, inflict 1 point of stability damage to the attacker.

Support Actions now trigger an additional 1 time per turn, and recovers 1 point of stability index for other allied units within 4 tiles around the user.

skills.name: Winter's Wrath
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Freeze damage equal to 100% of attack to it. This skill's critical rate is reduced by 100% and deals additional fixed damage equal to 50% of defense. For every other allied unit within 6 tiles, stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point. If the target is in Stability Break, recovers 2 points of stability.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Freeze damage equal to 100% of attack to it. This skill's critical rate is reduced by 100% and deals additional fixed damage equal to 50% of defense. If this attack causes Stability Break, the fixed damage dealt is increased to 125% of defense. For every other allied unit within 6 tiles, stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point. If the target is in Stability Break, recovers 2 points of stability.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If it causes Stability Break, increase fixed damage to 125% of defense.

skills.name: Snow's Grace
skills.description: Select 1 allied target (excluding self) within 6 tiles and apply [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] for 2 turns. Frost Barrier absorption amount is equal to 130% of Suomi's initial attack, but cannot exceed 100% of the target's max HP. Restore 2 stability index. For each enemy units within 5 tiles of selected target, apply 1 stack of [effect:b0f569df-032b-4e4e-bc7c-3d45fa86cb74] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 allied target (excluding self) within 6 tiles, apply [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] and [effect:2b1851b8-0629-41b3-80f0-43e38203378b] for 2 turns. Frost Barrier absorption amount is equal to 130% of Suomi's initial attack, but cannot exceed 100% of the target's max HP. Restore 2 stability index. For each enemy units within 5 tiles of selected target, apply 1 stack of [effect:b0f569df-032b-4e4e-bc7c-3d45fa86cb74] (2 stacks for large enemy units) for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Apply [effect:2b1851b8-0629-41b3-80f0-43e38203378b] to the target for 2 turns. For each surrounding large enemy unit, apply 1 additional stack of [effect:b0f569df-032b-4e4e-bc7c-3d45fa86cb74].

skills.name: Snowfield's Radiance
skills.description:
Selects 1 empty tile within 6 tiles, dealing fixed damage equal to 50% of defense to all enemy targets within 3 tiles, applying 2 stacks of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012].

Restores 2 points of stability, cleanses 1 debuff, and cleanses the effect of [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] from all allied units. Additionally, applies [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] and 1 stack of [effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154] for 3 turns.
Frost Barrier absorbs damage equal to 100% of Suomi's initial attack, up to a maximum of 100% of the target's max HP.

After the skill is used, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles in a snowflake-shaped area within 4 tiles around the selected tile for 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 empty tile within 6 tiles, dealing fixed damage equal to 50% of defense to all enemy targets within 3 tiles, applying 3 stacks of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012].

Restores HP equal to 30% of Suomi's max HP, 6 points of stability, cleanses 1 debuff, and cleanses the effect of [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] from all allied units. Additionally, applies [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] and 1 stack of [effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154] for 3 turns.

[effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154] applied to allied units (excluding Suomi) is increased by 1 stack. Frost Barrier absorbs damage equal to 100% of Suomi's initial attack, up to a maximum of 100% of the target's max HP.

If an allied unit is at full HP before being healed, they gain an additional 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], and [effect:baf41815-8bb6-4104-bd1f-e3217ff87d31] lasting 3 turns.

After the skill is used, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles in a snowflake-shaped area within 4 tiles around the selected tile for 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects 1 empty tile within 6 tiles, dealing fixed damage equal to 50% of defense to all enemy targets within 3 tiles, applying 3 stacks of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012].

Restores HP equal to 50% of Suomi's max HP, 6 points of stability, cleanses 3 debuffs, and cleanses the effect of [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from all allied units. Additionally, applies [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279], [effect:e8b188c4-e3be-4dee-8708-82b8ac81726e], and 1 stack of [effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154] for 3 turns.

[effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154] applied to allied units (excluding Suomi) is increased by 1 stack. Frost Barrier absorbs damage equal to 100% of Suomi's initial attack. Increases the effect of [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600] by 30%, up to a maximum of 150% of the target's max HP.

If an allied unit is at full HP before being healed, they gain an additional 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], and [effect:baf41815-8bb6-4104-bd1f-e3217ff87d31] lasting 3 turns.

After the skill is used, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles in a snowflake-shaped area within 5 tiles around the selected tile for 3 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Increase the number of stacks of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012] by 1.

Recovers HP equal to 30% of Suomi's maximum HP and restores stability index by 4 points to all allied units. All allied units (excluding self) gain an additional 1 stack of [effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154].

If the allied unit is at full HP before being healed, they gain an additional 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] and [effect:baf41815-8bb6-4104-bd1f-e3217ff87d31] for 3 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Applies [effect:e8b188c4-e3be-4dee-8708-82b8ac81726e] to all allied units for 3 turns.

Increases the number of cleansed debuffs by 2, and also cleanses the effects of [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b].

Increases restored HP by 50% of Suomi's max HP. Expand the radius of [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] by 1 tile.

The effect of [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600] is enhanced by 30%, up to a maximum of 150% of the target's max HP.

keys.effect: When HP drops below 80%, restore 15% of this unit's maximum HP and gain [effect:16e665b8-d576-4fc1-9c34-838e33b2e7ad] for 2 turns. Can trigger only once per battle.

Damage dealt by [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is converted to Freeze Damage. When allied units have [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279], Freeze damage dealt is increased by 15%. At the start of the turn, recovers 4 points of stability. Before allied units attack, if they do not have [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279], Suomi immediately applies [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] for 2 turns on them, with an absorption amount equal to 60% of Suomi's initial attack, to a maximum of 100% of the target's max HP. When using the Ultimate skill Snowfield's Radiance, applies [effect:ee7221df-ee27-430b-8a85-f3b804da60a5] to enemy targets for 2 turns.
keys.displayTitle: Expansion Key - Rock and Roll, Snowflake!

keys.effect: After using the active skill Winter's Wrath, if the target goes into / is in Stability Break, restores 2 points of Suomi's stability.
At the start of the battle, gains 3 points of Confectance Index.
When using the active skill Snow's Grace, if the target's HP is below 80%, gain 1 point of Confectance Index.
At the start of your turn, for each allied unit (excluding self) whose HP is below 80%, increase this unit's mobility by 1 tile.

When inflicted with [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], or [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887], immediately cleanse that effect and become immune to [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], or [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] for one turn. Simultaneously, gain [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] for 3 turns. Frost Barrier absorbs damage equal to 60% of base attack, up to a maximum of 100% of maximum HP. This can trigger only 1 time per battle.
At the end of this unit's action, if this unit's stability is greater than 0, recovers 10% of this unit's maximum HP and 1 point of stability.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 6 - Logistics Support in Progress

vertebrae.effect:
Increase the number of stacks of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012] by 1.

Recovers HP equal to 30% of Suomi's maximum HP and restores stability index by 4 points to all allied units. All allied units (excluding self) gain an additional 1 stack of [effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154].

If the allied unit is at full HP before being healed, they gain an additional 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] and [effect:baf41815-8bb6-4104-bd1f-e3217ff87d31] for 3 turns.

skillsLevel2.name: Winter's Wrath
skillsLevel2.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Freeze damage equal to 100% of attack to it. This skill's critical rate is reduced by 100% and deals additional fixed damage equal to 50% of defense. For every other allied unit within 6 tiles, stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point. If the target is in Stability Break, recovers 2 points of stability.
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Freeze damage equal to 100% of attack to it. This skill's critical rate is reduced by 100% and deals additional fixed damage equal to 50% of defense. If this attack causes Stability Break, the fixed damage dealt is increased to 125% of defense. For every other allied unit within 6 tiles, stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point. If the target is in Stability Break, recovers 2 points of stability.

vertebrae.effect:
Addtional effect [effect:089480d9-864e-47ff-a750-08dd03ab7ba4] is added: when attacked, if [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] is not broken, inflict 1 point of stability damage to the attacker.

Support Actions now trigger an additional 1 time per turn, and recovers 1 point of stability index for other allied units within 4 tiles around the user.

doll.effects: A cute, conscientious, and kind-hearted Doll who will do what it takes for a mission. She bravely steps forward for her companions in the Community whilst she wanders the lands in search of those she treasures dearly. You need not worry when entrusting her with assignments; she will never fail to meet your expectations of complete her missions.

skillsLevel3.name: Source of Warmth
skillsLevel3.description:
At the end of the action, gains 2 points of Confectance Index, restores 5% of Suomi's max HP to other allied units within 6 tiles. If the target's HP is below 50%, increase the amount restored to 10%.

When allied units (excluding Suomi) use basic attacks or skills, Suomi applies [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012] to a random enemy target within 6 tiles of herself.

When an enemy unit within range takes targeted damage from an ally, prioritizes using [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] once, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. Applies [effect:a19417f1-0ecf-466a-a904-29e3de492bcf] to the allied units for 2 turns. This can be triggered twice per turn. When HP is above 80%, gains [effect:979e032e-adde-4d68-a1b8-77386c86901e].
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
At the end of the action, gains 2 points of Confectance Index, restores 5% of Suomi's max HP to other allied units within 6 tiles. If the target's HP is below 50%, increase the amount restored to 10%.

If allied units have [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279], applies [effect:089480d9-864e-47ff-a750-08dd03ab7ba4] to them.

When allied units (excluding Suomi) use basic attacks or skills, Suomi applies 1 stack of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012] to a random enemy target within 6 tiles of herself.

When an enemy unit within range takes targeted damage from an ally, prioritizes using [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] once, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. Applies [effect:a19417f1-0ecf-466a-a904-29e3de492bcf] to the allied units for 2 turns. This can be triggered twice per turn. When HP is above 80%, gains [effect:979e032e-adde-4d68-a1b8-77386c86901e].

vertebrae.effect:
Applies [effect:e8b188c4-e3be-4dee-8708-82b8ac81726e] to all allied units for 3 turns.

Increases the number of cleansed debuffs by 2, and also cleanses the effects of [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b].

Increases restored HP by 50% of Suomi's max HP. Expand the radius of [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] by 1 tile.

The effect of [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600] is enhanced by 30%, up to a maximum of 150% of the target's max HP.

She bravely steps forward for her companions in the Community whilst she wanders the lands in search of those she treasures dearly. skillsLevel3.name: Snowfield's Radiance
skillsLevel3.description:
Selects 1 empty tile within 6 tiles, dealing fixed damage equal to 50% of defense to all enemy targets within 3 tiles, applying 2 stacks of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012].

Restores 2 points of stability, cleanses 1 debuff, and cleanses the effect of [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] from all allied units. Additionally, applies [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] and 1 stack of [effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154] for 3 turns.
Frost Barrier absorbs damage equal to 100% of Suomi's initial attack, up to a maximum of 100% of the target's max HP.

After the skill is used, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles in a snowflake-shaped area within 4 tiles around the selected tile for 3 turns.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 empty tile within 6 tiles, dealing fixed damage equal to 50% of defense to all enemy targets within 3 tiles, applying 3 stacks of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012].

Restores HP equal to 30% of Suomi's max HP, 6 points of stability, cleanses 1 debuff, and cleanses the effect of [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] from all allied units. Additionally, applies [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] and 1 stack of [effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154] for 3 turns.

[effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154] applied to allied units (excluding Suomi) is increased by 1 stack. Frost Barrier absorbs damage equal to 100% of Suomi's initial attack, up to a maximum of 100% of the target's max HP.

If an allied unit is at full HP before being healed, they gain an additional 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], and [effect:baf41815-8bb6-4104-bd1f-e3217ff87d31] lasting 3 turns.

After the skill is used, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles in a snowflake-shaped area within 4 tiles around the selected tile for 3 turns.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
Selects 1 empty tile within 6 tiles, dealing fixed damage equal to 50% of defense to all enemy targets within 3 tiles, applying 3 stacks of [effect:3ded64d0-a3bc-45d7-9176-c93a17379012].

Restores HP equal to 50% of Suomi's max HP, 6 points of stability, cleanses 3 debuffs, and cleanses the effect of [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from all allied units. Additionally, applies [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279], [effect:e8b188c4-e3be-4dee-8708-82b8ac81726e], and 1 stack of [effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154] for 3 turns.

[effect:4832fc30-ae79-484a-9d8d-3d68afb42154] applied to allied units (excluding Suomi) is increased by 1 stack. Frost Barrier absorbs damage equal to 100% of Suomi's initial attack. Increases the effect of [effect:4b58c8fc-c426-4b72-91e5-92dfb9e5a600] by 30%, up to a maximum of 150% of the target's max HP.

If an allied unit is at full HP before being healed, they gain an additional 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], and [effect:baf41815-8bb6-4104-bd1f-e3217ff87d31] lasting 3 turns.

After the skill is used, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles in a snowflake-shaped area within 5 tiles around the selected tile for 3 turns.

imagoforms.effect: The defense of all allied units with Frost barrier is increased by 5%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Freeze damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
Shield effects applied by this unit are increased by 12%.
